notes: Uruguay are without two confirmed calf-injury absentees — Ronald Araujo (CB) and Giorgian De Arrascaeta (creative midfielder) — while Darwin Nunez is a rotation doubt after being hooked at half-time vs Saudi Arabia; Cape Verde have no injuries or suspensions and Bubista is expected to name an unchanged XI after their heroic 0-0 draw with Spain.
home_scorers: Darwin Nunez (leading striker, likely starter despite poor MD1 performance)
Federico Valverde (midfield engine, set-piece threat with De Arrascaeta absent)
Maxi Araujo (impact sub / late goal threat, scored the equaliser vs Saudi Arabia
away_scorers: Dailon Livramento (leading striker, 4 qualifying goals, on penalties)
Jamiro Monteiro (set-piece and free-kick taker, creative hub in midfield)
